summary: Website project with partner branding and navigation sidebar features being added.

existing_features.title: Add a 'Partners' section on the home page (landing page) that displays FreshGuard's partnerships with Frigidaire, Whirlpool, and KitchenAid. Show each brand name prominently (and logo placeholder if available), styled consistently with the existing FreshGuard brand design. Place this section between existing home page sections in a logical position (e.g., after the Hero or Features section).

Implement an openable/closeable sidebar navigation drawer that slides in from the left (or right) when triggered by a hamburger/menu button. The sidebar must list navigation links to every page and section: Business Plan, How It Works, Financials, The Pitch, and Sharks Vote — matching the screenshot provided. Clicking a link should navigate to or scroll to the corresponding page/section and close the sidebar. The trigger button must be persistently visible on all pages.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add partners section on first page highlighting Frigidaire, Whirlpool, and KitchenAid
Add openable sidebar navigation for easy access to all pages
